slot_table_help.profitability_definition: Payouts ÷ Sales per store × day × daypart (%).
slot_table_help.placement_rule: Offers on all active slots (TODC-{store}-${uplifted min subtotal}); Ads on bottom 8 active slots per store by orders (each gets both offer + ads in slot_info.csv; $140/wk, min bid $3).
